name: 暗影双匕（★） | 枯焦之色
nameZh: 暗影双匕（★） | 枯焦之色
descriptionEn: Designed for efficient brutality, using a push dagger is as simple as throwing a punch or two. It has been spray-painted in a sun-dappled pattern. The Phoenix is not a symbol of destruction... it's a symbol of rebirth - Valeria Jenner, Revolutionary
descriptionZh: 专为高效行凶设计，手推短匕用起来就和挥一两记重拳一样简单。 这把武器被漆上了阳光斑驳图案。 “凤凰”不是毁灭的象征… 恰恰相反，它象征着重生 - 革命者瓦莱里娅.琴纳
